name: com.photonengine.prototyping.addon.xritintegration
description: This addons allows to use Unity XR Interaction Toolkit in a multi-user context

samples.description: This demo scene is a ready-to-use modified version of the Unity XRIT Starter demo scene
This demo scene is a ready-to-use modified version of the Unity XRIT Starter demo scene, also including the toggle button and UI sync (requires the UIsynchronization add-on)
